    C

    calculate(float, float) - Method in class PIDControler
    Calculates the PID output based on the target and current light value.

    D

    doDetour() - Method in class ObstacleAvoidance
    Performs a 90-degree detour around an obstacle.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class RobotMain7
     

    O

    ObstacleAvoidance - Class in Unnamed Package
    ObstacleAvoidance class handles the detour maneuver.

    P

    PIDControler - Class in Unnamed Package
    PIDControler class handles the math for smooth line following.
    PIDControler(float, float, float) - Constructor for class PIDControler
     

    R

    reset() - Method in class PIDControler
    Resets the error history when starting a new movement.
    RobotMain7 - Class in Unnamed Package
    RobotMain7 is the main execution class.
